title: jmap-chat API idiomaticity: review findings
description: Collect and resolve the Rust idiomaticity issues surfaced in the cold-eyes API review. Each child issue is an independent fix; the epic closes when all are done.
notes: Child issues: jmap-chat-tui-0s4 (Message.body_type), jmap-chat-tui-1r9 (filter_presence type), jmap-chat-tui-o09 (let-else), jmap-chat-tui-q4b (crate root re-exports)
